🐰 Team List Tuesday

Drop in this week's Word docs. Get CMS-ready markdown out. Nothing else changes.

Drop team list Word docs here

or click to choose files — main squad, pathways, whatever you've got, all at once (.docx only)

No files loaded yet — drop this week's team list doc(s) above.
Formatting only — player names, numbers, order, captain markers and coach names are never changed, corrected or inferred.
  • Each Word doc becomes one article group: a Title field (📝 + headline), a Description field (the intro paragraph(s) before the first team), and a Team List field.
  • If a doc contains multiple teams (e.g. Pathways), they're all combined into one Team List field, separated by a "----" divider.
  • Team headings are detected automatically (any line starting with "The" and ending in "is:").
  • If a player's line is typed with a number in the document (e.g. "21- Cody Walker"), that exact number is used, even if it's out of the usual position order. Only when no number is typed does the tool number players by their position in the list.
  • Any hyperlink in the document (in the headline, description, or elsewhere) is converted to markdown link format, e.g. [link text](https://example.com).
  • If a title or a team's coach line can't be found, it's flagged so you can check the source doc.
  • Everything runs in your browser — no files are uploaded anywhere.
